title: shelff Sidecar Metadata
description: Metadata for a single PDF file managed by shelff. Stored as a sidecar file named {filename}.pdf.meta.json alongside the PDF.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Must be 1 for this version of the specification.

category.description: Category name assigned to this book. A book belongs to at most one category.

tags.description: Tags assigned to this book. A book can have zero or more tags.

DublinCoreMetadata.description: Metadata based on the Dublin Core Metadata Element Set. Field names use the 'dc:' prefix following Dublin Core convention.

dc:creator.description: Authors or creators of the book.

dc:date.description: Publication date. Typically in ISO 8601 date format (e.g. "2024-01-15"), but not strictly enforced.

dc:identifier.description: An identifier for the book (e.g. ISBN, DOI).

ReadingProgress.description: Reading progress and status for this book.

lastReadPage.description: The last page the reader was on (1-indexed).

lastReadAt.description: When the book was last read. ISO 8601 date-time in UTC.

totalPages.description: Total number of pages in the PDF.

status.description: Reading status. 'unread' = not yet started, 'reading' = in progress, 'finished' = completed.

finishedAt.description: When the book was marked as finished. ISO 8601 date-time in UTC.

DisplaySettings.description: Display preferences for rendering this PDF.

pageLayout.description: Page layout mode. 'single' = one page at a time, 'spread' = two pages side by side, 'spread-with-cover' = spread with first page displayed alone.
